title: Hit Accuracy Tracker
description: shows ur hit accuracy while pvping
body:
What It Does                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  Displays your hit/miss accuracy in real-time on your HUD while you play.                                              
                                                                                                                      
  HUD Display (Top-Left Corner)                                                                              

  Hit Accuracy
  Accuracy: 75.5%
  Hits: 151
  Misses: 49

  How It Works

  - Swing at entity → Counts as hit
  - Swing at air → Counts as miss
  - Shows live percentage accuracy

  Controls

  - R key → Reset stats

  Details

  - Client-side only (works anywhere, no server install needed)
  - Minecraft: 1.21, 1.21.1
  - Requires: Fabric API
  - File: hitaccuracy-1.0.0.jar (7.9 KB)

  Perfect for: PvP practice, tracking combat improvement, or just seeing how accurate you are!
